creator: keramida@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 2007-05-17 01:12, Damien Good wrote: >

Recover Data
> Recover Data supports data recovery from all linux based systems > including FreeBSD. With over 10 years experience, our data recovery > services are second to none. Specialising in recovering data for data > recovery companies and RAID configurations.

Hi, Thanks for your interest in FreeBSD :-) I have added a new entry for you in our web site. It should be online in a few hours, after the next scheduled web site build... Please note that I have made a minor change, since we can't use the text as it was originally submitted. The FreeBSD operating system is not Linux-based, so I have removed the "all Linux based systems including FreeBSD" part. By looking at the web site of your company, it seems that you are into the hard disk recovery business, so it's probably ok to avoid referring to FreeBSD as a Linux-based system. Having said that, however, if you still want to include a list of the Unix systems which you can support and have expertise with, let us know and we can work on extending the current description. Regards, Giorgos
